_comment: EXAMPLE: local OpenAI-compatible reviewer (vllm-mlx, Ollama, LM Studio, vLLM…). Content never leaves your machine. Copy the reviewers entry into ~/.omp/agent/resolve-vector.json. Find the model id by querying your server: curl http://127.0.0.1:8001/v1/models — then run /rv doctor.
_usage: the provider entry below must exist in your ~/.omp/agent/models.yml; adjust baseUrl and the model id to match YOUR server
